$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:legal_risk block (Legal Risk Register workflow). One block per flagged legal-risk area in memoir / autofiction / nonfiction with identifiable real people. The register FLAGS areas that may warrant legal review; it is NOT legal advice and never adjudicates (the module firewall: flag, don't practice law). `risk_class` is the exposure type (defamation | privacy | rights-clearance | other). `severity` is a LEGAL-ESCALATION tier (monitor | review-recommended | review-now), kept orthogonal to the editorial Must/Should/Could severity scale — it is not that. `escalation_trigger` is the condition that should route the item to counsel. `concern` and `disposition` describe the exposure and the handling (a flag, never a legal conclusion such as 'this is not defamatory' or 'protected by fair use' — validator W1 surfaces such drift). The register artifact must carry a not-a-lawyer disclaimer (validator L3). Validated by scripts/legal_risk.py. See docs/legal-risk-register.md.
title: APODICTIC legal risk item (apodictic.legal_risk.v1)
